database.name: VIEW SSTPC_LIQ_PRJ_INV_V
database.view: SELECT get_uuid() AS sstpc_liq_prj_inv_v_id, ci.ad_org_id, ci.ad_client_id, now() AS created, ci.createdby, now() AS updated, ci.updatedby, to_char('Y') AS isactive, cil.line, cil.c_invoiceline_id, ci.poreference AS num_referencia, ci.c_doctype_id, ci.documentno AS no_factura, ci.dateinvoiced AS fecha_factura, mp.m_product_id, mp.name AS producto, cil.linenetamt AS total_linea, ci.em_sstpc_liquidate AS liquidar, ci.c_costcenter_id, ci.dateinvoiced, cbp.c_bpartner_id FROM c_invoice ci JOIN c_invoiceline cil ON cil.c_invoice_id = ci.c_invoice_id JOIN m_product mp ON mp.m_product_id = cil.m_product_id LEFT JOIN c_doctype cd ON cd.c_doctype_id = ci.c_doctype_id LEFT JOIN c_bpartner cbp ON cbp.c_bpartner_id = ci.c_bpartner_id WHERE ci.issotrx = 'N' AND ci.docstatus = 'CO' AND cd.docbasetype = 'API' AND ci.posted = 'Y' AND ci.c_costcenter_id IS NOT NULL AND ci.posted = 'Y'
